metadata.name: Handle an Aircraft on Ground (AOG) Situation

description: An aircraft is grounded at a remote airport due to a critical component failure. An MRO logistics agent must urgently ship a replacement part.

nodes.task_description: Receive the AOG request, identifying the required part number and the aircraft's location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the part and location.

nodes.task_description: Search the global inventory system to find the nearest location with the spare part in stock.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the part is available at a warehouse 500 miles away.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for expedited shipping (e.g., next flight out) for the part and provide tracking information to the field maintenance team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the shipment and communicates the tracking details.
